args:
set -eu
single_json=$(mktemp)
two_json=$(mktemp)
SOCK_TEST_HOST_PROFILE=nvidia-sm90 cargo run --quiet --bin sock -- doctor --format json > "$single_json"
SOCK_TEST_HOST_PROFILE=nvidia-sm90-2gpu cargo run --quiet --bin sock -- doctor --format json > "$two_json"
python3 - "$single_json" "$two_json" <<'PY'
import json, sys
single = json.load(open(sys.argv[1]))
two = json.load(open(sys.argv[2]))
assert single['accelerator_vendor'] == 'Nvidia'
assert single['device_count'] == 1
assert single['runtime_contract']['profile'] == 'cuda'
assert single['runtime_contract']['vllm_target_device'] == 'cuda'
assert single['runtime_contract']['default_tensor_parallelism'] == 1
assert single['runtime_contract']['env_defaults']['CUDA_DEVICE_ORDER'] == 'PCI_BUS_ID'
assert single['runtime_contract']['env_defaults']['CUDA_MODULE_LOADING'] == 'LAZY'
assert single['runtime_contract']['env_defaults']['VLLM_WORKER_MULTIPROC_METHOD'] == 'spawn'
assert 'cuda.runtime_version' in single['runtime_contract']['required_witnesses']
assert 'nvidia.compute_capability' in single['runtime_contract']['required_witnesses']
assert 'CudaGraphs' in single['runtime_contract']['preferred_backend_families']
assert 'AotInductor' in single['runtime_contract']['preferred_backend_families']
assert two['accelerator_vendor'] == 'Nvidia'
assert two['device_count'] == 2
assert two['runtime_contract']['default_tensor_parallelism'] == 2
assert two['runtime_contract']['env_defaults'] == single['runtime_contract']['env_defaults']
PY
printf 'cuda-runtime-contract\n'

set -eu
single_json=$(mktemp)
two_json=$(mktemp)
SOCK_TEST_HOST_PROFILE=nvidia-sm90 cargo run --quiet --bin sock -- doctor --format json > "$single_json"
SOCK_TEST_HOST_PROFILE=nvidia-sm90-2gpu cargo run --quiet --bin sock -- doctor --format json > "$two_json"
python3 - "$single_json" "$two_json" <<'PY'
import json, sys
single = json.load(open(sys.argv[1]))
two = json.load(open(sys.argv[2]))
assert single['accelerator_vendor'] == 'Nvidia'
assert single['device_count'] == 1
assert single['runtime_contract']['profile'] == 'cuda'
assert single['runtime_contract']['vllm_target_device'] == 'cuda'
assert single['runtime_contract']['default_tensor_parallelism'] == 1
assert single['runtime_contract']['env_defaults']['CUDA_DEVICE_ORDER'] == 'PCI_BUS_ID'
assert single['runtime_contract']['env_defaults']['CUDA_MODULE_LOADING'] == 'LAZY'
assert single['runtime_contract']['env_defaults']['VLLM_WORKER_MULTIPROC_METHOD'] == 'spawn'
assert 'cuda.runtime_version' in single['runtime_contract']['required_witnesses']
assert 'nvidia.compute_capability' in single['runtime_contract']['required_witnesses']
assert 'CudaGraphs' in single['runtime_contract']['preferred_backend_families']
assert 'AotInductor' in single['runtime_contract']['preferred_backend_families']
assert two['accelerator_vendor'] == 'Nvidia'
assert two['device_count'] == 2
assert two['runtime_contract']['default_tensor_parallelism'] == 2
assert two['runtime_contract']['env_defaults'] == single['runtime_contract']['env_defaults']
PY
printf 'cuda-runtime-contract\n'

set -eu
py_bin=python3
if [ -x vllm/.venv/bin/python ]; then
  py_bin=vllm/.venv/bin/python
fi
matrix_json=$(mktemp)
"$py_bin" cuda-shim/run_matrix.py --json --inference-contract > "$matrix_json"
"$py_bin" - "$matrix_json" <<'PY'
import json, sys
matrix = json.load(open(sys.argv[1]))
assert matrix['ok'] is False
assert matrix['scenario_count'] == 5
by_name = {row['scenario']: row for row in matrix['results']}
assert by_name['rtx4090_single_gpu_flashinfer_gptq']['inference_contract']['ok'] is True
assert by_name['h100_fp8_cutlass_mla']['inference_contract']['ok'] is True
blackwell = by_name['blackwell_nvfp4']['inference_contract']
assert blackwell['ok'] is True
assert blackwell['tmh_pressure']['layout'] == 'tmh_fidelity_paged_kv'
assert blackwell['tmh_pressure']['reduction_pct'] > 40.0
invalid = by_name['invalid_launch_blocking_with_graphs']['inference_contract']
assert invalid['ok'] is False
assert invalid['failure_reasons']
PY
printf 'cuda-shim-inference-contract\n'

set -eu
py_bin=python3
if [ -x vllm/.venv/bin/python ]; then
  py_bin=vllm/.venv/bin/python
fi
matrix_json=$(mktemp)
"$py_bin" cuda-shim/run_matrix.py --json --inference-contract > "$matrix_json"
"$py_bin" - "$matrix_json" <<'PY'
import json, sys
matrix = json.load(open(sys.argv[1]))
assert matrix['ok'] is False
assert matrix['scenario_count'] == 5
by_name = {row['scenario']: row for row in matrix['results']}
assert by_name['rtx4090_single_gpu_flashinfer_gptq']['inference_contract']['ok'] is True

assert blackwell['ok'] is True
assert blackwell['tmh_pressure']['layout'] == 'tmh_fidelity_paged_kv'
assert blackwell['tmh_pressure']['reduction_pct'] > 40.0
invalid = by_name['invalid_launch_blocking_with_graphs']['inference_contract']

assert invalid['failure_reasons']
PY
printf 'cuda-shim-inference-contract\n'
